_description: Default configuration for distributed pipeline runs using IngestorEngine. CLI arguments override these values.

defaults._max_tickers_comment: null = all available tickers. Set to integer to limit.
defaults._days_comment: Number of days of historical data to fetch
defaults._dry_run_comment: If true, simulate API calls without making real requests
defaults._skip_bronze_comment: If true, skip bronze layer ingestion
defaults._skip_silver_comment: If true, skip silver layer model building
defaults._log_level_comment: Logging level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR
defaults._storage_path_comment: Absolute path to storage root. Contains bronze/ and silver/ subdirectories.

alpha_vantage._endpoints_comment: Endpoints to ingest. Available: time_series_daily, time_series_daily_adjusted, company_overview, global_quote, income_statement, balance_sheet, cash_flow, earnings

chicago._endpoints_comment: Core municipal data. Available: crimes, building_permits, business_licenses, food_inspections, cta_l_ridership_daily, cta_bus_ridership_daily

cook_county._endpoints_comment: Core property data. Available: parcel_sales, assessed_values, parcel_universe, residential_characteristics

silver_models._models_comment: Models to build after bronze ingestion. Order matters (dependencies). Supported: temporal, company, stocks
silver_models._skip_on_dry_run_comment: If true, skip silver build during dry runs (default: true - no data to build from)

cluster._spark_master_comment: Spark master URL. 'auto' = discover from SPARK_MASTER_URL env var or use local
cluster._fallback_to_local_comment: If cluster connection fails, run locally
cluster._task_batch_size_comment: Number of tickers to process in each batch

ticker_source._priority_comment: Order of sources to try for ticker discovery (v2.0 table names). NO HARDCODED FALLBACKS.
ticker_source._securities_reference_comment: v2.0 unified ticker reference from LISTING_STATUS
ticker_source._company_reference_comment: v2.0 company data from OVERVIEW (has CIK, sector, etc.)
ticker_source._filter_us_exchanges_comment: Only include tickers from US exchanges (NYSE, NASDAQ, etc.)

retry._comment: Retry configuration for failed API calls

profiles._comment: Named profiles for common run scenarios. Use --profile to activate.

dev._comment: Full dev profile: alpha_vantage (10 tickers w/ financials) + chicago (6 endpoints) + cook_county (4 endpoints). Endpoint limits from markdown configs.
